MANA: +10 ENDUR: +10

Race: ALL

AC: 6
MANA: +10 ENDUR: +10
WT: 2.5 Size: SMALL

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 35

Snow Dervish

# May 29 2003 at 4:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788318602
39 posts
I got one off a snow dervish in the Eastern Wastes...much better than the small bronze brigadine mantle that I've been carrying around since my days in PC...
▲ Page top
got this from Pulsating Icestorm
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2002 at 8:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758857553
4 posts
I picked this item up off of a Pulsating Icestorm in Iceclad, near Tower of Frozen Shadow. He looks like a shadow guardian, conned blue to me at level 39, resisted my snare a couple times, nothing big, and was able to kill him pretty easily.

Daleini Torrin, Druid of the 39th Season of Tunare
(Povar)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 7:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I bought one of these of a vendor in Erudin for only 8pp and some sp and cp.
Not a bad mantle for casters
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2001 at 5:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Was waiting in Eastern Wastes last night for my Enchanter friend to get back to his body and CR. While waiting I had a dervish attack me. Soloed it and found one on his body, first kill in EW... so the post-patch drop on these is still ok. Necro friend is loving it :)

Anallion Malkieri
42nd Warrior of Zek
Bristlebane

# Dec 07 2000 at 11:01 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
This is a common drop from frozen (or whatever they are called) dervishes in Eastern Wastes. My group even killed one that had two on it. I think these mobs are mid to high 30's.
~Tinuviel Elvenstar
~Druid of 46 Seasons
~Clan Omega, Tribunal

# Dec 10 2000 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965823950
12 posts
Hmm might want to re think the last one guys was before loot tables where fixed umm buddy of mine was hunting snow cougars for like 3 days excellent XP i hear pre 40's , any way the day after the patch the ratio of one every 20 dropping a cougar claw earring went to one to infinity , so dont try to count on drop rates posted pre patch , just FYI to avoid frustation to the farmers that were not aware :)
